items.question: How long before I see results from social media marketing?
items.answer: Most clients start seeing noticeable engagement improvements within the first 30 days. Significant follower growth and lead generation typically kicks in by month 2-3.

items.question: Do I need a big budget for paid ads?
items.answer: Not at all! We work with ad budgets starting from ₹10,000/month. Our team optimizes every rupee to maximize your ROI.

items.question: What kind of AI automation can you set up?
items.answer: We can automate almost any repetitive business process — from WhatsApp chatbots and email sequences to full CRM workflows, lead scoring, and multi-tool integrations.

items.question: How long does it take to build a website?
items.answer: A landing page takes 5-7 days. A full business website typically takes 2-3 weeks. E-commerce sites take 4-6 weeks depending on complexity.

items.question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
items.answer: Yes! Our monthly retainers have no long-term lock-in. You can cancel with 15 days' notice. Quarterly plans come with a 15% discount.

items.question: Do you offer custom packages?
items.answer: Absolutely! Contact us for a free consultation and we'll create a custom package tailored to your specific needs, goals, and budget.
